market_pulse: Competitive venues aggressively booking major electronic talent through May and into Memorial Day weekend; LIV and LIV Beach maintain strong EDC Week momentum with diverse lineups.

content_gaps.description: Competitors emphasizing Latin/reggaeton integration (@deseolatinsundays at OMNIA, ongoing Tao Beach positioning). LIV could amplify Latin-electronic crossover content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Develop Latin-electronic fusion content series; feature reggaeton DJs on LIV Beach rotation

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting more BTS setup/artist arrival content (prep shots, DJ booth teases). LIV social currently focuses on post-event highlights.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase pre-event BTS content 24-48h before major nights to build anticipation

influencer_activity.mention: Multiple user-generated posts from guests attending John Summit performances at LIV Beach during EDC Week; strong engagement from party attendees documenting the experience.
Promotional posts and user content featuring Discolines performances at LIV Beach; branded day-club energy content resonating with audience.
EDC Week booking announcement at Zouk Nightclub competing directly for electronic music audience during festival week.

Memorial Day weekend DJ schedule (@knock2music, @discolines, @davidguetta, @johnsummit) positioned across May 14-17.
